LightningComponentBundle.description: Generic card for displaying record details with edit capability

property.name: primaryFieldCount
property.label: Primary Fields Count
property.description: Number of fields to show before collapse

property.name: objectApiName
property.label: Object API Name
property.description: API name of the Salesforce object (e.g., Need_Offer__c). Auto-populated on record detail pages.

property.name: primaryFieldCount
property.label: Primary Fields Count
property.description: Number of fields to show before collapse

property.name: headerTitleField
property.label: Header Title Field
property.description: API name of field to use as card title

property.name: headerSubtitleField
property.label: Header Subtitle Field
property.description: API name of field to use as subtitle

property.name: timestampField
property.label: Timestamp Field
property.description: API name of date/datetime field for timestamp

property.name: avatarField
property.label: Avatar Field
property.description: API name of URL field for avatar image

property.name: imageField
property.label: Image Field
property.description: API name of URL field for card image

property.name: statusField
property.label: Status Field
property.description: API name of field for status badge
